description: A styled blockquote component displaying a quoted text with author attribution. Can appear as a simple inline quote within article content or as a full-width testimonial with a background image.

FR-01.title: Quote Text
FR-01.description: The block MUST display the quoted text prominently.
acceptance: Blockquote element with styled quote text
F37 Lineca Medium or Roboto Regular depending on variant
Larger font size than body text (24-32px)
May include opening/closing quotation marks as decorative elements

FR-02.title: Author Attribution
FR-02.description: The block MUST display the author name and optionally their title/role.
acceptance: Author name displayed below quote text

FR-03.title: Visual Distinction
FR-03.description: The quote MUST be visually distinguished from surrounding body content.
acceptance: Different font, size, or styling from body paragraphs
May use left border, background, or decorative quotation marks
Clear visual separation from adjacent content

A.description: A contained pull quote used within article body content. No background image, just styled text with attribution.

additionalRequirements.FR-A01: Quote contained within article body width (~640px).
additionalRequirements.FR-A03: Uses cmp-quote component with xx-large variant.

B.description: A large testimonial block spanning full width with a background image and semi-transparent dark overlay. Quote text and author displayed over the image.

additionalRequirements.FR-B01: Background image spans full container width.
additionalRequirements.FR-B02: Semi-transparent dark overlay ensures text readability.
additionalRequirements.FR-B03: Quote text and attribution displayed in white (#FFFFFF).
additionalRequirements.FR-B04: Container uses semi-transparent-layer and large-radius classes.
additionalRequirements.FR-B05: Uses height-tall variant for more vertical space.

accessibility.AC-01: Quote MUST use <blockquote> element or ARIA role
accessibility.AC-02: Attribution MUST be programmatically associated with the quote
accessibility.AC-03: White text on image overlay MUST meet WCAG AA contrast
